---
title: "Proofs and Illustrations of the attributes of God from the facts and laws of the physical universe: being the foundation of natural and revealed religion"
---

## Proofs and Illustrations of the attributes of God from the facts and laws of the physical universe: being the foundation of natural and revealed religion

**Author:** John MacCulloch
**Date:** 1837
**Imprint:** London: Duncan

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
